Tests ad-tagging on arbitrary node elements via DOM.adRelatedStateUpdated and DOM.Node.isAdRelated

--- Testing DOM.adRelatedStateUpdated Event Dispatch ---
Event Triggered: DOM.adRelatedStateUpdated
Event nodeId matches target: true
Event isAdRelated: true

--- Testing Static Serialization ---
Node localName: span
Node isAdRelated (via describeNode): true
